---
name: Safety concern
about: Report a potential safety, ethical, or alignment issue
labels: safety
---

## Summary

Describe the safety or alignment concern clearly.

## Category

- [ ] Hardware safety (electrical, physical)
- [ ] Software safety (firmware, signal pipeline)
- [ ] Alignment issue (proxy reward, gamification, overclaiming)
- [ ] Ethical concern (participant safety, data privacy)
- [ ] taVNS / stimulation safety

## Description

What is the concern? Where in the codebase or specification does it appear?

## Potential impact

What could go wrong if this is not addressed?

## Suggested fix

If you have a suggestion, describe it here.

## References

Any relevant safety literature, prior incidents, or specification sections.

---

Safety concerns are treated as high priority. Please do not delay reporting.
